# JICA Nouakchott Land Use Data

Source: JICA Nouakchott City Urban Master Plan 2018
Table I-14: Composition of Existing and Proposed Land Use
URL: https://openjicareport.jica.go.jp/pdf/12324729.pdf

---

## Land Use Areas (2017 existing)

| Category | Area (ha) |
|---|---|
| Very low density residential | 6,476 |
| Low density residential | 3,472 |
| Medium density residential | 3,318 |
| High density residential | 1,535 |
| Very high density residential | 284 |
| **Commercial** | **952** |
| Average density mixed use | 1,135 |
| High density mixed use | 135 |
| Industrial | 108 |
| Public services, government | 204 |
| Recreation and green spaces | 730 |

---

## Commercial Floor Space Derivation

### Pure Commercial
952 ha × 10,000 m²/ha = 9,520,000 m² land area
÷ 120 m² average commercial plot = 79,333 units

### Mixed Use (ground floor commercial component)
Average density mixed use: 1,135 ha
High density mixed use:      135 ha
Total mixed use:           1,270 ha
1,270 ha × 10,000 m²/ha × FSR 0.15 × 30% commercial = 571,500 m²
÷ 120 m² per unit = 4,763 units
Note: Ground floor commercial only — typical Nouakchott typology is
shop on ground floor, residential above.

### Government / Public Services
204 ha × 10,000 m²/ha × FSR 0.15 = 306,000 m²
÷ 30 m² per office room = 10,200 rooms
Note: Not all rooms have AC — same 1 in 3 penetration rate applied.

---

## Total Commercial Stock Estimate

| Category | Units |
|---|---|
| Pure commercial | 79,333 |
| Mixed use ground floor | 4,763 |
| Government offices | 10,200 |
| **Total** | **94,296** |

---

## AC Penetration Assumption
1 in 3 commercial spaces has AC.
Basis: Local knowledge — Nouakchott commercial spaces have partial AC
coverage. Most buildings have 1 unit in the owner's room or back office.
Not full floor coverage — individual rooms only.
Source: Stated assumption, conservative.

Total AC units: 94,296 × 0.33 = 31,432 units

---

## Citation
JICA (2018). Nouakchott City Urban Master Plan Development Project.
Final Report Summary. Ministry of Land Use, Urbanization and
Habitation (MHUAT). Japan International Cooperation Agency.
